pageHero.heading: Contact us
pageHero.intro: Have a question about care, insurance, or scheduling? Reach out by phone or email. We respond as soon as we can during business hours.

contactInfo.heading: We are here to help
contactInfo.intro: Elevate serves patients in California and Nevada. Virtual appointments are available through a secure telehealth platform.

crisisPolicy.heading: Crisis Policy & Immediate Support
paragraphs: Elevate Mental Health and Wellness provides scheduled psychiatric care and outpatient treatment. We do not provide 24/7 crisis management, immediate emergency services, or walk-in psychiatric care.

If you or a loved one is experiencing a life-threatening medical emergency, a severe mental health crisis, or is in imminent danger of hurting themselves or others, please do not wait for an office reply. Seek help immediately.

resources.label: Call or Text 988
resources.detail: The 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline provides free, confidential, 24/7 support for anyone experiencing mental health-related distress or a suicidal crisis.

resources.label: Text HOME to 741741
resources.detail: Connect with the Crisis Text Line to chat text-based with a trained crisis counselor 24/7.

resources.label: Call 911
resources.detail: For immediate physical safety emergencies, call 911 or go to your nearest Hospital Emergency Room.

resources.label: Veterans Crisis Line
resources.detail: Dial 988, then press 1, or text 838255 for dedicated veteran support.

crisisPolicy.patientsNote: For Existing Patients: If you are experiencing a non-emergency clinical issue or a medication side effect outside of office hours, please leave a secure message through your TherapyNotes Patient Portal or call our office line. We will review your message during normal business hours on our next operational day.

ctaPanel.heading: Ready to schedule?
ctaPanel.description: Request an appointment to start care with Elevate. Virtual visits are available for your convenience.

footer.description: Providing individualized psychiatric care and brief psychotherapy designed to help you feel better and live better.
